topTopic.name: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey dominates box-office conversation and awards buzz
topTopic.why: The day's largest shared theme across independent headlines is Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey'—multiple bylines about its box-office prospects, cast/crew profiles, format milestones (IMAX 70mm), and retrospective rankings, making it the dominant conversation.
